detaileddescription.para: Waveform type discriminant (the type create argument / type choice).

briefdescription.para: Maximal-length-sequence (MLS) primitive polynomial for an LFSR of the given register length, in pn_core's Galois convention. Returns 0 for lengths with no table entry (caller errors). Verified period 2^n-1 for n=2..16.

memberdef.argsstring: (int type, double fs, double freq, double snr, int snr_mode, uint32_t seed, int sps, int pn_length, uint32_t pn_poly)
memberdef.name: synth_create

simplesect.para: Heap-allocated state, or NULL on allocation failure.
Caller must call synth_destroy() when done.

briefdescription.para: Destroy a synth instance and release all memory.
Reset Synth to its post-create state.
Generate one output sample from internal state.
Generate a block of output samples.
